issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: create-repo-with-ci-and-protection
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response A is incomplete or missing key elements.

scenarios.name: pr-with-jira-and-slack-webhook
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements with explicit POST calls, reviewers, close_source_branch, webhook registration, and Slack handler, whereas Response A lacks the required Bitbucket API calls and webhook setup.
